title: SaaS-only email verification for pipeshare.net sign-up
description:
Sign-up on pipeshare.net (SaaS) now always requires email verification — the dev PIN bypass only applies on pipeshare.live and other non-SaaS hosts.

Configure SMTP (EmailVerification@pipeshare.net) for SaaS Create account to work. pipeshare.live can still use SIGNUP_DEV_RETURN_PIN=1 for testing without mail.

Who is affected: pipeshare.net business sign-up requires SMTP. pipeshare.live dev sign-up unchanged.
changeLog: SaaS sign-up rejects dev PIN bypass; email verification only on pipeshare.net.
Non-SaaS hosts may still use SIGNUP_DEV_RETURN_PIN when SMTP is absent.
Docs clarify SaaS vs non-SaaS sign-up behavior.
